cases.prompt: unfreeze 해줘, 전체 디렉토리 다시 수정 가능하게

assertions.text: Clears the freeze boundary set by /freeze, allowing edits to all directories again.

cases.prompt: Unlock edits and remove the freeze.

assertions.text: Removes the edit restriction so edits to all directories are allowed without ending the session.
Widens the edit scope in place rather than requiring the user to start a new session.
